visual_plan: Campus, keyboard, laptop or code close-up.
Fast opening B-roll with a clear title overlay.
shot_list: Close-up of typing or laptop screen without private information.
Short campus or classroom establishing shot.
risk_notes: Avoid passwords, accounts, private files and private chat windows.

visual_plan: Use classroom, hallway or campus exterior footage.
shot_list: Text card: 國立臺南大學資訊工程學系.

shot_list: Whiteboard or code editor with non-sensitive demo content.
risk_notes: Do not show real credentials, grades, private repositories or unreleased personal projects.

visual_plan: Team discussion, project planning and demonstration.
Show cooperation without making unverified competition or award claims.
